holdings.infoBox: SMMV is an equity ETF with a total of 362 individual holdings. The top holdings are Pinnacle West Capital stock at N/A, Agree Realty at N/A, The New York Times Company at N/A, Omega Healthcare Investors at N/A, and RenaissanceRe Holdings at N/A.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI USA Small-Cap Min Vol Factor ETF (SMMV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund tracks an index of US-listed small capitalization stocks selected and weighted to create a low volatility portfolio, subject to constraints. SMMV was launched on Sep 7, 2016 and is issued by BlackRock.
